title: One Block 100 DAYS
description: Survive and thrive on a single block! Start with nothing and expand your world one block at a time. Can you reach 100 days and conquer every challenge that awaits?
body:
You begin standing on a single block floating in the void. Every time you break it, a new block appears—sometimes helpful, sometimes dangerous. Gather resources, build your base, fight off mobs, and explore different phases as you progress.

Your goal? Survive 100 days and prove your skills as the ultimate survivor.
